_comment_about_this_file: Save this as `.mcp.json` in the root of any project you want to use mobileproxy from.
Claude Code reads the file on startup; you'll be prompted to approve the server.
MOBILEPROXY_API_KEY is read from your shell env via ${env:...} — set it once
(e.g. in your PowerShell profile) so you don't have to put it in this file.
After npm publish, swap the command/args block for the npx variant shown in claude-desktop.json.
